title: PixelReward
description: A reward/lottery/prize plugin that displays in holographic
body: [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/937622491076108338?logo=Discord&label=discord)](https://discord.gg/UJNAGjuyhS) [![QQ](https://img.shields.io/badge/QQ-906136216-brightgreen?logo=qq)](http://qm.qq.com/cgi-bin/qm/qr?_wv=1027&k=ZIfkm_tDAqWGbCZvcjQ6hhA-zGwkn_bm&authKey=ecCS9Tn8KTjJHwuCkMVqjaVFLFxue5q%2BXgHzLtYXjTiEb6mlmEJr%2FTq4Jz%2Bh94%2Fk&noverify=0&group_code=906136216) [![Wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/wiki-available-brightgreen?logo=readthedocs)](https://docs.p1mc.top/) [![bStats](https://img.shields.io/badge/bstats-pixelreward-blue?logo=google-analytics)](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/PixelReward/29149) [![SpigotMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/To-SpigotMC-yellow)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/132423/) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/To-Modrinth-darkgreen)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/pixelreward) ## Introduction This is a lottery/reward/prize plugin that displays animation in hologram way, which abandons the traditional animation of chest menu. - Reward animation in holographic way. - MySQL support. - Customizable rewards. - Modern color format MiniMessage support. There are some item editors like MMOItems are supported, which allows giving item with random stats, random tier and specified data to the player. View list of compatible plugins in [PixelCraft Documentation](https://docs.p1mc.top/PixelReward/compatible_plugins.html) ## Images ![hologram_monitor](https://s2.loli.net/2026/02/04/eAUVngZ7FP5EK1J.png) ![hologram_surround](https://s2.loli.net/2026/02/08/N7K4OI6wJbgCUuA.png) ![reward_editor](https://s2.loli.net/2026/02/08/F9V6xduqytEIjKG.png) ## Usage See full usage at [PixelCraft Documentation](https://docs.p1mc.top/PixelReward/intro.html)
